activities_projects.title: Bhakti and Sufi Saints Chart
activities_projects.objective: Learn about important Bhakti and Sufi saints
steps: List at least five Bhakti saints and five Sufi saints
Write their teachings and regions
Present the chart to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the contributions and teachings of Bhakti and Sufi saints
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of information and presentation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Teachings Poster Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the core teachings of the Bhakti movement
steps: Choose one Bhakti saint such as Kabir, Mirabai, or Tulsidas
Write their main teachings
Illustrate the poster with symbols or drawings
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognizes the values of devotion, equality, and love preached by saints
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Devotional Songs Collection
steps: Find examples of Bhajans or Sufi songs
Write a few lines from them
Explain their meaning in simple words
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the role of music in spreading devotion
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of examples and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Saint Biography Writing
activities_projects.objective: Learn about the life of a devotional saint
steps: Choose a saint such as Guru Nanak or Kabir
Write a short biography including birthplace and teachings
Share it with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns important historical facts about devotional leaders

activities_projects.title: Map Activity – Spread of Bhakti Movement
activities_projects.objective: Understand the geographical spread of devotional movements
steps: Mark places associated with famous saints
Label the regions where Bhakti or Sufi traditions flourished
Add a legend explaining the symbols used
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands regional spread of devotional traditions

activities_projects.title: Role Play on Saints
steps: Choose a saint such as Kabir, Mirabai, or Guru Nanak
Prepare a short dialogue explaining their teachings
Perform the role play in class

activities_projects.title: Values from Bhakti and Sufi Teachings
activities_projects.objective: Identify moral values taught by saints
steps: List values such as equality, love, and devotion
Write examples from teachings of saints
Discuss how these values apply today
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects historical teachings with modern values
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of examples and reflection (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Devotional Poetry Reading
steps: Read a short poem by Kabir or Mirabai
Underline important lines
Explain the message in simple words

activities_projects.title: Quiz on Devotional Movements
steps: Prepare 10 questions about Bhakti and Sufi saints
Conduct a quiz among classmates
Keep score for correct answers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Reinforces key concepts of the chapter
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of questions and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Compare Bhakti and Sufi Traditions
steps: Create a table with two columns: Bhakti and Sufi
List their main beliefs, practices, and leaders
Present the comparison in class
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and completeness of comparison (10 marks)
